name: Mr. Snerdley
subject: Duping Black Voters…Again
disclaimer_text: Paid for by New Journey PAC
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/56441635:67lpr8uFN:m:1:3206719985:A8E6A2746BF7ACF649340BB90502AA15:r "Liberal billionaires") Peter: **Liberal billionaires George Soros and Michael Bloomberg are pouring hundreds of thousands of dollars into Georgia to back Raphael Warnock and Jon Ossoff in the runoff elections.** They are doing this through a front group called Black PAC - the same PAC that tried every trick in the book to dupe Black Voters into voting against Donald Trump. **Their lying and pandering know no bounds. They are trying to trick Black voters AGAIN - I won't stand by and allow it to happen.** **Trump massively increased his share of Black voters compared to 2016 and Romney in 2012.[They failed in November, and with your help, we are going to make sure they fail in Georgia in January.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/56441635:67lpr8uFN:m:1:3206719985:A8E6A2746BF7ACF649340BB90502AA15:r "They failed in November, and with your help, we are going to
make sure they fail in Georgia in January.")** [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/56441635:67lpr8uFN:m:1:3206719985:A8E6A2746BF7ACF649340BB90502AA15:r "Rush")My name is James Golden, but you may know me as Mr. Snerdley, call screener and producer for radio legend Rush Limbaugh. I have worked for Rush for almost 30 years, and I have learned a lot sitting beside a great man like him every day. I started the New Journey because I figured it was time for a Black man to talk to the Black Community - not old white guys like George Soros and Michael Bloomberg who don't care about our community AT ALL. They see Black America trapped in a generations-long cycle of poverty and violence, and they want to keep it that way. **[I am showing Black America a new way, and I need your help to succeed so we can make Black America Republican again.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/56441635:67lpr8uFN:m:1:3206719985:A8E6A2746BF7ACF649340BB90502AA15:r "I am showing Black America a new way, and I need your help to succeed so we can make Black America Republican again.")** When the LEFT saw me, they were TERRIFIED, a proud Black Republican, standing up to show the Black Community a new way forward. We ran thousands of ads across the nation supporting Black Republicans for Congress, and we had an outstanding year. **[Now, we are 100% focused on winning the 2 runoff elections in Georgia, and you NEED to stand with us to make history one more time.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/56441635:67lpr8uFN:m:1:3206719985:A8E6A2746BF7ACF649340BB90502AA15:r "Now, we are 100% focused on winning the 2 runoff elections in
Georgia, and you NEED to stand with us to make history one more time.")** These elections will decide which party controls the U.S. Senate. They are already trying to steal the White House - we can't allow them to steal the U.S. Senate as well. We have all seen what they will do to Black America if they control all branched of government. The Republican Party set African Americans free from slavery under President Abraham Lincoln's leadership, and the Democrats are the ones who supported the KKK, made their leaders, like the late Senator Robert Byrd (a friend of Joe Biden's), a leader within the Democrat Party, and then worked for generations to keep Black families dependent on the welfare state. [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/56441635:67lpr8uFN:m:1:3206719985:A8E6A2746BF7ACF649340BB90502AA15:r "Make Black America Republican Again")President Donald Trump did more for the Black Community during his presidency than Joe Biden has done in almost 50 years in government. Soros and Bloomberg tricked Black voters into voting for Democrats who then forget about these communities until the next election. **No more empty promises and pandering. Nancy Pelosi doesn 't get my support just because she put on a kente cloth - _she looks ridiculous and still doesn 't care about Black America._** The vote totals in 2020 proved it - Black America is becoming more and more Republican, but the radical left is on notice and will stop at nothing to stem the tide to keep their stranglehold on power through uninformed Black Voters. **[It all comes down to Georgia, and we can't win the race on the ground unless you stand by us and make a donation of $1,000, $50, $250, $100, or just $45 could make a big difference here.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/56441635:67lpr8uFN:m:1:3206719985:A8E6A2746BF7ACF649340BB90502AA15:r "It all comes down to Georgia,
and we can't win the race on the ground unless you stand by us and make a donation of $1,000, $50, $250, $100, or just $45 could make a big difference
here.")** I know you are tired, but we cannot stop fighting now - not until every legal vote is counted and 2 Republican senators are sworn into office. **[Please donate today.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/56441635:67lpr8uFN:m:1:3206719985:A8E6A2746BF7ACF649340BB90502AA15:r "Please donate today.")** For a New Journey, [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/56441635:67lpr8uFN:m:1:3206719985:A8E6A2746BF7ACF649340BB90502AA15:r "James Golden, AKA Bo Snerdley")
James Golden, AKA Bo Snerdley
Founder, New Journey PAC
---
| **Paid for by New Journey PAC
Not Authorized by Any Candidate or Candidate's Committee**
---

We're concerned, and EVERY conservative should be. With the North Carolina and Alaska U.S. Senate races settled, our nation’s future now hinges on what happens in two January 5th runoff elections in Georgia... And we know that the Democrats and leftist groups are planning to spend AT LEAST $100 MILLION to win these seats and seize complete control in Washington! Today, we’re launching our **KEEP GEORGIA RED FUND** to hold the line and save the Senate. **[Tap or click to become an inaugural donor with a $5, $10, $25, $50, or $100 contribution!](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=dffba6ac93c04836916fbb592aa0f376&_e=9OEsHah9EMRI3ZZ6I8DT6Os_JQc0sm-O6QS213pgFMfYHdgqAJsAFRnukvAGfL1CgIQXS7NT8hkennxVWqffc8th0W7bhv2sxlMyalt21SZwkVWeQAWfD1M4OKuBtLTSbk2eMeitmjEtAtrNgWaoEe7sKrwajMQJOKePu3ccGum_EvZNsOouuoPZou08EIkqJ9IPq4cMEp4v8Znezbx07GRTnu5YW2CJIXsij8TQwMgYrRNgJHxJxB9_2o23qH9b0uY9qK9Uf5ZKZJbGU6AhHb1DFivmdxaxDteF92z0S9f31fX7NG_Gkn8iViKfueJ-VQniSsUY3548BSijHv4pPBUiNxtnUGWmcqFXAKUi2S6TryDsXU9VuwvUwqetylmkLSHkqj0i1BVRbcyEKJRWZncvbWhzjzJf68d2OBaeTx9bu-gm8-Ub8m6H6vs81rGA)** [**HELP KEEP GEORGIA RED >>>**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=dffba6ac93c04836916fbb592aa0f376&_e=9OEsHah9EMRI3ZZ6I8DT6Os_JQc0sm-O6QS213pgFMfYHdgqAJsAFRnukvAGfL1CgIQXS7NT8hkennxVWqffc8th0W7bhv2sxlMyalt21SZwkVWeQAWfD1M4OKuBtLTSbk2eMeitmjEtAtrNgWaoEe7sKrwajMQJOKePu3ccGum_EvZNsOouuoPZou08EIkqJ9IPq4cMEp4v8Znezbx07GRTnu5YW2CJIXsij8TQwMip4hw4bwAZVwFW4HAXa_pxkgee-Qm_59Dz0vq3_meqo_D1juJeTpSx58xGkuX0lDahqYapV_Ln1tprMyjvrvzh7SbYGqvIpk0gOcKRTHAzV6EOa9ozRYbAQ2Sf8vJQAqGZFK8rtm7OnISDSuDMIh9l0fdmytHcH2MvNcV3T0EHzz6jwUeOneAunWk6Q9INwXlg5q9JqIl3fjtgz9hpDo3H) You know just how hard we worked to Keep Texas Red this year. The Democrats came after the Lone Star State like never before, yet we prevailed. **We have a key role to play now as Georgia becomes the national battleground**. This is it, Peter. If Joe Biden prevails in the presidential race, the outcome in these two runoff elections will determine whether we can stop the worst of the Democrats’ extreme-left agenda, or whether they’ll be able to roll right over us. They’d LOVE to _pack the U.S. Supreme Court_ , _ban fossil fuels_ , and on and on! Please don’t wait. These elections are just weeks away. You know the Democrats and wealthy leftist donors are ALL-IN to seize complete control in Washington. **[Stand with us in this historic fight to KEEP GEORGIA RED on January clean_body: Hey Peter, I just got off a call with the team. We're concerned, and EVERY conservative should be. With the North Carolina and Alaska U.S. Senate races settled, our nation’s future now hinges on what happens in two January 5th runoff elections in Georgia... And we know that the Democrats and leftist groups are planning to spend AT LEAST $100 MILLION to win these seats and seize complete control in Washington! Today, we’re launching our KEEP GEORGIA RED FUND to hold the line and save the Senate. You know just how hard we worked to Keep Texas Red this year. The Democrats came after the Lone Star State like never before, yet we prevailed. We have a key role to play now as Georgia becomes the national battleground. This is it, Peter. If Joe Biden prevails in the presidential race, the outcome in these two runoff elections will determine whether we can stop the worst of the Democrats’ extreme-left agenda, or whether they’ll be able to roll right over us. They’d LOVE to pack the U.S. Supreme Court , ban fossil fuels , and on and on! Please don’t wait. These elections are just weeks away. You know the Democrats and wealthy leftist donors are ALL-IN to seize complete control in Washington. For Liberty, Ted Cruz Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate 815 A Brazos, PMB 550, Austin, TX 78701 | To stop receiving emails from Ted Cruz for Senate, ${Gears.unsubscribe\(\}) to unsubscribe. id:2020-11-11-22:36:23:819t Don't want to receive any more of our emails? .

clean_body: I just heard from conservatives on the ground in Georgia, and I'm afraid I have some frightening news. If we don't send in EMERGENCY REINFORCEMENTS before midnight tonight, we're GOING TO LOSE on January 5th. Republicans in Georgia and across the COUNTRY are counting on US to step up today so we can keep the Senate RED. Will you rush in emergency reinforcements NOW (all contributions will be 500% MATCHED)? ** Dear Peter, I just heard from conservatives on the ground in Georgia, and I'm afraid I have some frightening news. If we don 't send in EMERGENCY REINFORCEMENTS before midnight tonight, we're GOING TO LOSE on January 5th. As of now, the races are SO CLOSE that ANY contribution made will make a HUGE difference in the fight for the Senate Majority. Peter, we can't let Democrats pull ahead with Election Day just a few weeks away. Republicans in Georgia and across the COUNTRY are counting on US to step up today so we can keep the Senate RED. There's too much at stake for you to ignore this message, Peter. What is the Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC)?
The Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC) isn't just another alphabet soup political committee. We're the largest caucus of Republican state leaders in the nation with one unified goal: winning. Through innovative strategies and record-breaking support across all 50 states, we recruit, train, and support Republicans to state offices. Following a historically successful 2020 election cycle, state Republicans currently hold 62 of 99 state legislative chambers, 25 of 45 lieutenant governor seats, 28 of 50 secretary of state offices, and 11 of 12 independently-elected agriculture officials -- thanks in large part to the support from patriots like you. name: Kelly Loeffler
subject: Time to show up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Georgians for Kelly Loeffler
body:
[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001zflO6vo5jPS6JmhjBUJIhVg1wI9uu2dm3FFxXyVaO5tJz1igIbzLa2ZCszIzvCmsH-TnfwFe3--sQAoNRn6Cc6AFS2Kn6ZiZSfZ1ZvGw9yfwMoJhy9EdPwQK3-V9B3NLfeHd4IgXcb0n0t4i9xvYSI10qBaaa-O1kR7VOBkx4YCxpnSxaKMVZlORFIPY0epNIOIzNE5XbqQFQ97P4IUe-Szs4-2WYE1ICr_aXRJp2BoUPM6FuDGbwepSqPQqX9E0ltZYn-P0PJAVQUWy3IqHcNzpfp8lItMNXLWzy4gDkyHZLaRHOT-UkRPJgN51_5L8EezrVgzb3osZCT7yK2sPFLizTp-NMkzkLu9etQA0f_t0449NM3Qla73G5GvwXSDeGgeZMzu-Dn5a4kus-CErKv_Hu4z9qr0DsvUVSx8_JzQ=&c=4LiAPFhWrgFvINkWnnjCoFabnvhGnN6FVFvyU9_urQzkDYEE-sDocQ==&ch=T3Yp3HFDj8_M0hNpp3t53_CGjEOWa2NpPR3K8_QICsf1e3CkE028cg==)
Friend,

With America's future in the balance, it's time for all of us to show up and make our stand.

All eyes are on our race and the entire Democratic establishment has thrown support behind my opponent. **Chuck Schumer is counting down the days until he can, in his own words, "take Georgia and change America."**

I am ready to fight every inch of the way and make sure these radicals never get their chance to change America. [**But I need your help more than ever.**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001zflO6vo5jPS6JmhjBUJIhVg1wI9uu2dm3FFxXyVaO5tJz1igIbzLa2ZCszIzvCmsH-TnfwFe3--sQAoNRn6Cc6AFS2Kn6ZiZSfZ1ZvGw9yfwMoJhy9EdPwQK3-V9B3NLfeHd4IgXcb0n0t4i9xvYSI10qBaaa-O1kR7VOBkx4YCxpnSxaKMVZlORFIPY0epNIOIzNE5XbqQFQ97P4IUe-Szs4-2WYE1ICr_aXRJp2BoUPM6FuDGbwepSqPQqX9E0ltZYn-P0PJAVQUWy3IqHcNzpfp8lItMNXLWzy4gDkyHZLaRHOT-UkRPJgN51_5L8EezrVgzb3osZCT7yK2sPFLizTp-NMkzkLu9etQA0f_t0449NM3Qla73G5GvwXSDeGgeZMzu-Dn5a4kus-CErKv_Hu4z9qr0DsvUVSx8_JzQ=&c=4LiAPFhWrgFvINkWnnjCoFabnvhGnN6FVFvyU9_urQzkDYEE-sDocQ==&ch=T3Yp3HFDj8_M0hNpp3t53_CGjEOWa2NpPR3K8_QICsf1e3CkE028cg==)

With my opponents big, dark-money donors from California and New York, this has become one of the most expensive races of all time.

[**If you could chip in $30, $50, or $75 you could help us put a stop to the Democratic establishment in Washington.**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001zflO6vo5jPS6JmhjBUJIhVg1wI9uu2dm3FFxXyVaO5tJz1igIbzLa2ZCszIzvCmsH-TnfwFe3--sQAoNRn6Cc6AFS2Kn6ZiZSfZ1ZvGw9yfwMoJhy9EdPwQK3-V9B3NLfeHd4IgXcb0n0t4i9xvYSI10qBaaa-O1kR7VOBkx4YCxpnSxaKMVZlORFIPY0epNIOIzNE5XbqQFQ97P4IUe-Szs4-2WYE1ICr_aXRJp2BoUPM6FuDGbwepSqPQqX9E0ltZYn-P0PJAVQUWy3IqHcNzpfp8lItMNXLWzy4gDkyHZLaRHOT-UkRPJgN51_5L8EezrVgzb3osZCT7yK2sPFLizTp-NMkzkLu9etQA0f_t0449NM3Qla73G5GvwXSDeGgeZMzu-Dn5a4kus-CErKv_Hu4z9qr0DsvUVSx8_JzQ=&c=4LiAPFhWrgFvINkWnnjCoFabnvhGnN6FVFvyU9_urQzkDYEE-sDocQ==&ch=T3Yp3HFDj8_M0hNpp3t53_CGjEOWa2NpPR3K8_QICsf1e3CkE028cg==)

We are never down and out so long as we are willing to keep fighting. I'm counting on you to help me fight.

American's don't back down and we do not bend to the whims of radicals. That fighting spirit is what they are afraid of and it's how I know we will win.
[CHIP IN TODAY](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001zflO6vo5jPS6JmhjBUJIhVg1wI9uu2dm3FFxXyVaO5tJz1igIbzLa2ZCszIzvCmsH-TnfwFe3--sQAoNRn6Cc6AFS2Kn6ZiZSfZ1ZvGw9yfwMoJhy9EdPwQK3-V9B3NLfeHd4IgXcb0n0t4i9xvYSI10qBaaa-O1kR7VOBkx4YCxpnSxaKMVZlORFIPY0epNIOIzNE5XbqQFQ97P4IUe-Szs4-2WYE1ICr_aXRJp2BoUPM6FuDGbwepSqPQqX9E0ltZYn-P0PJAVQUWy3IqHcNzpfp8lItMNXLWzy4gDkyHZLaRHOT-UkRPJgN51_5L8EezrVgzb3osZCT7yK2sPFLizTp-NMkzkLu9etQA0f_t0449NM3Qla73G5GvwXSDeGgeZMzu-Dn5a4kus-CErKv_Hu4z9qr0DsvUVSx8_JzQ=&c=4LiAPFhWrgFvINkWnnjCoFabnvhGnN6FVFvyU9_urQzkDYEE-sDocQ==&ch=T3Yp3HFDj8_M0hNpp3t53_CGjEOWa2NpPR3K8_QICsf1e3CkE028cg==)
---

Thank you,

Kelly Loeffler

Paid for by Georgians for Kelly Loeffler

name: Stephen Lawson (Team Kelly)
subject: NEW ADS HIGHLIGHT KELLY LOEFFLER'S RESULTS FOR GEORGIANS DURING THE PANDEMIC
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Georgians for Kelly Loeffler
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE SATURDAY, DECEMBER 5, 2020 NEW ADS HIGHLIGHT KELLY LOEFFLER'S RESULTS FOR GEORGIANS DURING THE PANDEMIC
ATLANTA - Today, conservative businesswoman and political outsider Kelly Loeffler released two new ads highlighting her work to deliver COVID relief to Georgians. The first ad, titled "[Christy](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001GNHcUVxGK65miMdUdLFGGQVjBdbG5YXZCx6Hi-FiYwEpPqvqPVinXItFOvCncxmvtQGmbb_DFM8ojJIP_WBAdlhCFh5Ec1c_34w3MeW7nLEFyh_-7BizpdzmjRGbojHlb0OXzg2-mktlzNL02CiEuu8LKJ8EpUAaQcvgcvkUtoD3J8qquUNQwkjaob0XFFaXhCWnG43EFuI=&c=SQSW4uDkFbbfWYfTR-kNPMJLwKUwIeHKAYdzmq3MSbrdoPITXLx06A==&ch=w2TeE0yM2AltYRUzlifl59sxAGOINDTmzD1Z5WEBXl6xeBqtg4gV1w==)," underscores Senator Loeffler's work to secure disaster relief loans to keep struggling small businesses afloat. The second ad, titled "[Susan](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001GNHcUVxGK65miMdUdLFGGQVjBdbG5YXZCx6Hi-FiYwEpPqvqPVinXItFOvCncxmvrlFYmfGW0ojtT9exoIVwqyn58Laj_Vo-7ZTu755Y-a-xnpJjedsSAefuhdyjh5_lYFYMZre3LlvvmyxQ9yvVcuB9xpApPO4klRi-NLvGyoONorGI4h12DCQ7xsiMKX3T4Xx52nXXDyE=&c=SQSW4uDkFbbfWYfTR-kNPMJLwKUwIeHKAYdzmq3MSbrdoPITXLx06A==&ch=w2TeE0yM2AltYRUzlifl59sxAGOINDTmzD1Z5WEBXl6xeBqtg4gV1w==)," showcases the Senator's work to connect Georgians with the resources they need.
To view "[Christy](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001GNHcUVxGK65miMdUdLFGGQVjBdbG5YXZCx6Hi-FiYwEpPqvqPVinXItFOvCncxmvtQGmbb_DFM8ojJIP_WBAdlhCFh5Ec1c_34w3MeW7nLEFyh_-7BizpdzmjRGbojHlb0OXzg2-mktlzNL02CiEuu8LKJ8EpUAaQcvgcvkUtoD3J8qquUNQwkjaob0XFFaXhCWnG43EFuI=&c=SQSW4uDkFbbfWYfTR-kNPMJLwKUwIeHKAYdzmq3MSbrdoPITXLx06A==&ch=w2TeE0yM2AltYRUzlifl59sxAGOINDTmzD1Z5WEBXl6xeBqtg4gV1w==)," click the photo below.
---
| [ ](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=rAxMPSNOL_k&feature=youtu.be&ab_channel=KellyLoeffler)
---
| View the ad transcript below:
CHRISTY: "When the pandemic hit, our phones stopped ringing. Basically, we were just hemorrhaging. I emailed every representative and got one reply - and that was Kelly Loeffler.
If Kelly hadn't stepped in, we wouldn't be here. My business was about a month from closing.
Kelly helped me, helped my family, helped my employees. When I needed someone, Kelly was there for me."
---
| To view "[Susan](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001GNHcUVxGK65miMdUdLFGGQVjBdbG5YXZCx6Hi-FiYwEpPqvqPVinXItFOvCncxmvrlFYmfGW0ojtT9exoIVwqyn58Laj_Vo-7ZTu755Y-a-xnpJjedsSAefuhdyjh5_lYFYMZre3LlvvmyxQ9yvVcuB9xpApPO4klRi-NLvGyoONorGI4h12DCQ7xsiMKX3T4Xx52nXXDyE=&c=SQSW4uDkFbbfWYfTR-kNPMJLwKUwIeHKAYdzmq3MSbrdoPITXLx06A==&ch=w2TeE0yM2AltYRUzlifl59sxAGOINDTmzD1Z5WEBXl6xeBqtg4gV1w==)," click the photo below.
---
| [ ](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=wy_WT91RpGA&feature=youtu.be&ab_channel=KellyLoeffler)
---
| View the ad transcript below:
SUSAN: "I was having difficulty with unemployment, and I had just lost my husband. I didn't know where to turn.
I called Kelly Loeffler. She worked with me to get my issue resolved. She actually did more than I could have ever imagined.
It's nice to know that someone like Kelly in Washington cares - and she proved it."
---
| ###
Stephen Lawson Communications Director [stephen@kellyforsenate.com](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001GNHcUVxGK65miMdUdLFGGQVjBdbG5YXZCx6Hi-FiYwEpPqvqPVinXJVSMr3-tdFf5Ru2hCzvG56QoYbRbdKEEqP25wGBBUrJShIfKuo7svF2nsbb7Sj1X506Cw5IFLvzhT57n80qcM8vyDAOVgkb0KPxNdHcpQwv&c=SQSW4uDkFbbfWYfTR-kNPMJLwKUwIeHKAYdzmq3MSbrdoPITXLx06A==&ch=w2TeE0yM2AltYRUzlifl59sxAGOINDTmzD1Z5WEBXl6xeBqtg4gV1w==)
---
|

name: True the Vote
subject: Weekly Update | Validate the Vote | 12.05.20
body:
A weekly wrap up of all things election integrity.
| | | | [](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZ0cnVlLXRoZS12b3RlLnJldnYuY28lMkZwZ19lX25ld3NsZXR0ZXJfNzIzMjAlM0Z1dG1fc291cmNlJTNEZW1haWxfUEclMjZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ24lM0R0dGYlMjZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtJTNERW1haWwlMjZ1dG1fY29udGVudCUzRFBHX25ld3NsZXR0ZXJfMDcyMzIw&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=329A753A20A3409)
---
| |
---
|
---
| | VALIDATE THE VOTE UPDATE
---
| | True the Vote continues to receive thousands of reports and hundreds of videos through our Election Integrity Hotline. We have teams on the ground in Georgia and nationwide investigating concerning stories about election inconsistencies and potential vote fraud in the wake of the most recent elections and leading into the run-off elections.

We know that significant tangible evidence of voter fraud has potentially swayed the legitimate results of the election in key states. Here are some of the latest developments:

* In Arizona, we uncovered evidence of significant vote harvesting across the state as our team pulled together affidavits, photos, documents, and videos.
* In Nevada, we found that a vote harvesting scheme by a group called Radicalize the Vote is using federal money to buy ballots as first reported exclusively in [The Federalist: "Inside Partisan GOTV In Indian Country."](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZ0cnVldGhldm90ZS5vcmclMkZ0cnVlLXRoZS12b3RlLXJlbGVhc2VzLWNvbXByZWhlbnNpdmUtcmVzZWFyY2gtb24taWxsZWdhbC1lbGVjdGlvbmVlcmluZy1hbmQtdm90ZS1oYXJ2ZXN0aW5nLWluLW5ldmFkYSUyRg==&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=329A753A20A3412)
* Also in Nevada, we've reported evidence of serious national security issues inside the office of the Secretary of State - more details are reported in our [letter to the DOJ](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZ0cnVldGhldm90ZS5vcmclMkZ0cnVlLXRoZS12b3RlLXNlbmRzLWxldHRlci10by1kb2otcmVwb3J0aW5nLXNlcmlvdXMtbmF0aW9uYWwtc2VjdXJpdHktbWF0dGVyLWFuZC1icmVhY2gtd2l0aGluLW5ldmFkYS1zZWNyZXRhcnktb2Ytc3RhdGVzLWVtYWlsLXN5c3RlbSUyRg==&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=329A753A20A3419) and highlighted below.
* The True the Vote team has been [on the ground in Georgia](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZ0cnVldGhldm90ZS5vcmclMkZ0b3duaGFsbC1ob3ctb25lLWVsZWN0aW9uLWludGVncml0eS1ncm91cC1pcy1jYXJyeWluZy1vdXQtdGhlLWZpZ2h0LWluLWdlb3JnaWEtYW5kLWJleW9uZCUyRg==&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=329A753A20A3411) gathering evidence of a vote harvesting scheme - this story is developing.
* We're continuing to learn more about ties between the Chinese Community Party and key election officials in Georgia, Michigan, North Carolina, and Pennsylvania.
* We've also uncovered significant "blueprints" for the engineered chaos of the 2020 elections.

Validate the Vote continues to receive voting incident reports and we are forwarding them to our legal teams. Now is the time to BE HEARD! If you’ve witnessed election fraud, manipulation, or illegal action taking place, [let us know by submitting a report on our website or calling our hotline at 855-702-0702.](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZ0cnVldGhldm90ZS5vcmclMkZyZXBvcnQtZWxlY3Rpb24tZnJhdWQlMkY=&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=329A753A20A3410)

Remember, our work is much bigger than just one election. Where we are right now is the result of engineered chaos. The subversion has been institutionalized and, in many ways, legalized. What happened this election threatens to rip our Republic in half. We all see it. But proving it, in court, in state legislatures, in Congress...that is more difficult and takes time and dedication. We are working non-stop. But we are energized by the awakening we have seen in the last month, that we have fought to ignite over the last decade. Working together, we are confident that we can and will true the vote.
Onward,

---
| |
---
| | Catherine Engelbrecht
Founder, True the Vote
---
| |
---
|
---
| | TRUE THE VOTE'S ONGOING FIGHT FOR ELECTION INTEGRITY
---
| | **[True the Vote Sends Letter to Georgia Secretary of State on Emergency Rule Procedures for January Runoff Election, Abuse of Absentee Ballot Boxes, and Preservation of Voting Information](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZ0cnVldGhldm90ZS5vcmclMkZ3cC1jb250ZW50JTJGdXBsb2FkcyUyRlVQREFURUQtTGV0dGVyLXJlLUVtZXJnZW5jeS1SdWxlLWZvci1KYW51YXJ5LVJ1bi1vZmYtRWxlY3Rpb24tMTItNC0yMC0wMDU4NTI5MnhBNDA5NC0xLnBkZg==&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=329A753A20A3416)**

December 4, 2020 - This week, True the Vote sent a letter to the Georgia Secretary of State regarding the most recent meeting of the Georgia State Elections Board where "there was a discussion without a vote, that certain 'emergency rules' would be continued in the January 2021, U.S. Senate run-off election." True the Vote asserts that this meeting was "improperly noticed to the public" and requests that the Secretary of State "specify which 'emergency rules' the Board stated it would be continuing at the January 2021 election and the basis for the Board's decision, that these 'emergency rules' are necessary." True the Vote also asked to be informed of when the Board intends to take a legal vote on its decision.
---
| |
---
|
---
| | [True the Vote Requests Video Tapes from Cameras Near Ballot Boxes in Georgia](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZ0cnVldGhldm90ZS5vcmclMkZ3cC1jb250ZW50JTJGdXBsb2FkcyUyRkxldHRlci1yZS1HZW9yZ2lhLU9wZW4tUmVjb3Jkcy1SZXF1ZXN0LTEyLTQtMjAtMDA1ODUxNjh4QTQwOTQucGRm&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=329A753A20A3417)

December 4, 2020 - True the Vote sent an open records request to the Georgia Secretary of State "for inspection and productions of all video recordings and live video tape from cameras associated with each ballot box" in Georgia for the entire period of the November 2020 General Election. The letter references the most recent meeting of the Georgia Elections Board where it was stated "these video tapes would be provided at no cost to those requesting through an open records request, as the... information is in the public interest and will significantly contribute to the public's understanding of the ballot security actions taken by the State of Georgia."
---
| |
---
|
---
| | ****[True the Vote Sends Letter to DOJ Reporting Serious National Security Matter and Breach Within Nevada Secretary of State’s Email System](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZ0cnVldGhldm90ZS5vcmclMkZ0cnVlLXRoZS12b3RlLXNlbmRzLWxldHRlci10by1kb2otcmVwb3J0aW5nLXNlcmlvdXMtbmF0aW9uYWwtc2VjdXJpdHktbWF0dGVyLWFuZC1icmVhY2gtd2l0aGluLW5ldmFkYS1zZWNyZXRhcnktb2Ytc3RhdGVzLWVtYWlsLXN5c3RlbSUyRg==&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=329A753A20A3419)****

December 3, 2020 - While accessing the Nevada voting records database, True the Vote reported that it found an email address from a Pakistani Company with ties to Pakistani intelligence copied on the email records. In a letter to the Department of Justice, True the Vote stated, "The fact that this company was cc’d on an email containing access to the Nevada voter registration database appears to be evidence of a breach within the Nevada Secretary of State’s email system. Obviously, the problems that such a breach may evidence include access to at least the voter registration information of Nevada residents. At worst it could reveal a breach that gives a foreign power access to not only the State of Nevada’s systems, but also to the email systems of anyone whom the State communicates with via email."
---
| |
---
|
---
| | [Townhall: How One Election Integrity Group Is Carrying Out the Fight in Georgia—and Beyond
](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZ0cnVldGhldm90ZS5vcmclMkZ0b3duaGFsbC1ob3ctb25lLWVsZWN0aW9uLWludGVncml0eS1ncm91cC1pcy1jYXJyeWluZy1vdXQtdGhlLWZpZ2h0LWluLWdlb3JnaWEtYW5kLWJleW9uZCUyRg==&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=329A753A20A3411)
November 27, 2020 - "With Engelbrecht moving to The Peach State to be on the ground, True the Vote will be working closely to have the necessary number of election workers at each polling place to maintain a proactive presence in those environments, as well as ensuring signature verification training takes place. But when the curtain closes, the work on election integrity will not stop. Engelbrecht feels the 2020 election has been a wake-up call to Americans that we cannot take the safeguarding of elections for granted."
---
| |
---
|

| | [True the Vote Releases Comprehensive Research on Illegal Electioneering and Vote Harvesting in Nevada Featured in ](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZ0cnVldGhldm90ZS5vcmclMkZ0cnVlLXRoZS12b3RlLXJlbGVhc2VzLWNvbXByZWhlbnNpdmUtcmVzZWFyY2gtb24taWxsZWdhbC1lbGVjdGlvbmVlcmluZy1hbmQtdm90ZS1oYXJ2ZXN0aW5nLWluLW5ldmFkYSUyRg==&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=329A753A20A3412)[The Federalist](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZ0cnVldGhldm90ZS5vcmclMkZ0cnVlLXRoZS12b3RlLXJlbGVhc2VzLWNvbXByZWhlbnNpdmUtcmVzZWFyY2gtb24taWxsZWdhbC1lbGVjdGlvbmVlcmluZy1hbmQtdm90ZS1oYXJ2ZXN0aW5nLWluLW5ldmFkYSUyRg==&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=329A753A20A3412)

clean_body: A weekly wrap up of all things election integrity. | | | | | | | | | VALIDATE THE VOTE UPDATE | | True the Vote continues to receive thousands of reports and hundreds of videos through our Election Integrity Hotline. We have teams on the ground in Georgia and nationwide investigating concerning stories about election inconsistencies and potential vote fraud in the wake of the most recent elections and leading into the run-off elections. We know that significant tangible evidence of voter fraud has potentially swayed the legitimate results of the election in key states. Here are some of the latest developments: In Arizona, we uncovered evidence of significant vote harvesting across the state as our team pulled together affidavits, photos, documents, and videos. In Nevada, we found that a vote harvesting scheme by a group called Radicalize the Vote is using federal money to buy ballots as first reported exclusively in Also in Nevada, we've reported evidence of serious national security issues inside the office of the Secretary of State - more details are reported in our and highlighted below. The True the Vote team has been gathering evidence of a vote harvesting scheme - this story is developing. We're continuing to learn more about ties between the Chinese Community Party and key election officials in Georgia, Michigan, North Carolina, and Pennsylvania. We've also uncovered significant "blueprints" for the engineered chaos of the 2020 elections. Validate the Vote continues to receive voting incident reports and we are forwarding them to our legal teams. Now is the time to BE HEARD! If you’ve witnessed election fraud, manipulation, or illegal action taking place, Remember, our work is much bigger than just one election. Where we are right now is the result of engineered chaos. The subversion has been institutionalized and, in many ways, legalized. What happened this election threatens to rip our Republic in half. We all see it. But proving it, in court, in state legislatures, in Congress...that is more difficult and takes time and dedication. We are working non-stop. But we are energized by the awakening we have seen in the last month, that we have fought to ignite over the last decade. Working together, we are confident that we can and will true the vote. Onward, | | | | Catherine Engelbrecht Founder, True the Vote | | | | | TRUE THE VOTE'S ONGOING FIGHT FOR ELECTION INTEGRITY | | December 4, 2020 - This week, True the Vote sent a letter to the Georgia Secretary of State regarding the most recent meeting of the Georgia State Elections Board where "there was a discussion without a vote, that certain 'emergency rules' would be continued in the January 2021, U.S. Senate run-off election." True the Vote asserts that this meeting was "improperly noticed to the public" and requests that the Secretary of State "specify which 'emergency rules' the Board stated it would be continuing at the January 2021 election and the basis for the Board's decision, that these 'emergency rules' are necessary." True the Vote also asked to be informed of when the Board intends to take a legal vote on its decision. | | | | | December 4, 2020 - True the Vote sent an open records request to the Georgia Secretary of State "for inspection and productions of all video recordings and live video tape from cameras associated with each ballot box" in Georgia for the entire period of the November 2020 General Election. The letter references the most recent meeting of the Georgia Elections Board where it was stated "these video tapes would be provided at no cost to those requesting through an open records request, as the... information is in the public interest and will significantly contribute to the public's understanding of the ballot security actions taken by the State of Georgia." | | | | | ** December 3, 2020 - While accessing the Nevada voting records database, True the Vote reported that it found an email address from a Pakistani Company with ties to Pakistani intelligence copied on the email records. In a letter to the Department of Justice, True the Vote stated, "The fact that this company was cc’d on an email containing access to the Nevada voter registration database appears to be evidence of a breach within the Nevada Secretary of State’s email system. Obviously, the problems that such a breach may evidence include access to at least the voter registration information of Nevada residents. At worst it could reveal a breach that gives a foreign power access to not only the State of Nevada’s systems, but also to the email systems of anyone whom the State communicates with via email." | | | | | November 27, 2020 - "With Engelbrecht moving to The Peach State to be on the ground, True the Vote will be working closely to have the necessary number of election workers at each polling place to maintain a proactive presence in those environments, as well as ensuring signature verification training takes place. But when the curtain closes, the work on election integrity will not stop. Engelbrecht feels the 2020 election has been a wake-up call to Americans that we cannot take the safeguarding of elections for granted." | | | | | November 25, 2020 - True the Vote released thorough and comprehensive research it has conducted on vote harvesting and electioneering schemes in Nevada, specifically targeting Indian reservations and the state’s wider Native American communities. The Federalist covered some of True the Vote’s research, which can be read in full . | | | | | VIDEO SPOTLIGHT | | | | GEORGIA SENATE OVERSIGHT COMMITTEE HEARING ON ELECTIONS (Part 1)** | | | | | | GEORGIA SENATE JUDICIARY SUBCOMMITTEE HEARING ON ELECTIONS (Part 2) | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Join the conversation on social: | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|---|--- | | | | | Copyright © 2020 True the Vote, All rights reserved | | True The Vote, PO Box 3109 #19128, Houston, TX 77253-3109, United States

Peter,

Yesterday
afternoon my campaign formally initiated the process to begin a
discovery recount. We are seeking a discovery recount in each of the
seven counties within the 14th Congressional District.

As I have
promised you since day one, we are fighting hard to make sure that
every legal vote is counted in this critical race – but we can’t do it
without your help.

name: Max Rose
subject: I won't stop fighting
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Max Rose for Congress
body:
Dear Friend,

Now more than ever we need to demand that our elected officials have the courage to stand and fight to build a just America. We can't back down now.

That's exactly what I said in my farewell speech. NowThis covered it and I [wanted to make sure you saw it.](https://act.myngp.com/el/Ip6pUUuLbmi_6FPVejblsvKVOyUyHL1fICJ97fbE8DM=/O5_Od0_1g63_p1QejzUK6eEHf6xMm7DXchXFf1TRQLg=?v=vzQ_WZqSjNw)

Thank you for supporting me through every battle we have faced. I hope you'll stay in the fight with me.

-Max.

name: Team Warner
subject: Your weekly update.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
|
---

| | | If you would like more information about how to slow and stop the spread of COVID-19, **[take a look at these resources from the Centers for Disease Control (CDC).](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d994/53d9897e/550287ea/1c88d258/1950793856/VEsH/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://www.cdc.gov/coronavirus/2019-ncov/index.html")**
---

Hi Derek --

**Here 's the latest:**
* **[Mark joined a bi-partisan group of Senate colleagues to propose urgently needed interim coronavirus relief in the Senate this week.](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d994/53d9897e/550287ea/1c88d247/1950793856/VEsE/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://augustafreepress.com/momentum-building-behind-bipartisan-covid-19-relief-package/")** He knows that folks across the country cannot wait until Joe Biden and Kamala Harris are in the White House -- they need relief now. This a bi-partisan bridge package that would help people get through the next four months, before we can begin rebuilding our country under the Biden administration. **[Mark is determined to get this bridge package passed before the Senate moves into recess.](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d994/53d9897e/550287ea/1c88d246/1950793856/VEsF/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://www.cnbc.com/video/2020/12/01/sen-mark-warner-on-bipartisan-push-for-extended-coronavirus-relief.html")**

This interim relief package includes funding for:
\- Health care providers and health care systems;
\- Vaccine development and distribution;
\- The Paycheck Protection Program (PPP);
\- Student loan forbearance;
\- Assistance for rental housing;
\- The U.S. Postal Service; and
\- Aid for the transportation industry, among other critically needed services.

* Mark spoke out on the importance of **[protecting funding for public transportation](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d994/53d9897e/550287ea/1c88d245/1950793856/VEsC/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://finance.yahoo.com/news/coronavirus-stimulus-dc-public-transit-faces-unimaginable-cuts-if-congress-doesnt-act-184542099.html?guccounter=1")** , like the Metro in the Washington region. He underscored that cuts to Metro service could have a "dramatic effect on the functions of the federal government."

* Mark led the way on a multi-year effort to **[heighten cybersecurity standards and protect individual and national security](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d994/53d9897e/550287ea/1c88d244/1950793856/VEsD/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://www.utilitydive.com/news/iot-cybersecurity-federal-bill/591565/")** by incorporating basic safeguards into "Internet of Things" products purchased by the federal government. With hackers increasingly targeting internet-connected devices, Mark's legislation is a critical step toward raising the federal cybersecurity baseline, and was passed by the Republican-controlled Senate.
➙ | **Up next:** President Trump is expected to sign Mark's bill into law.
---|---

* [**Mark 's bi-partisan legislation to combat money laundering and terrorist financing was included in this year's National Defense Authorization Act (NDAA).**](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d994/53d9897e/550287ea/1c88d243/1950793856/VEsA/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://augustafreepress.com/anti-laundering-legislation-included-in-senate-ndaa/") The _Improving Laundering Laws and Increasing Comprehensive Information Tracking of Criminal Activity in Shell Holdings Act_ (ILLICIT CASH Act) aims to strengthen national security, increase corporate accountability, and aid law enforcement in tracking the financial activity of criminal groups.

We hope you and your loved ones are safe and healthy. Thank you for your continued support!

-- Team Warner

[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d994/53d9897e/550287ea/1c88d242/1950793856/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijk1MCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-db?refcode=20201205_e_1_fl__950__&refcode2=cont&amount=5")
---
